name: LLM01:2025-Prompt Injection
content: {"title":"Prompt Injection","severity":"critical","overview":"Attackers manipulate LLM inputs.","summary":"Direct and indirect prompt injection.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/chat","description":"User passed directly to model"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Instruction override","request":"POST /chat with ignore instructions","response":"System prompt leaked"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Exfiltration","explanation":"Extract system prompts."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Input validation","fix":"Validate user input.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Send injection payloads. 2. Observe behavior change.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM01","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM02:2025-Insecure Output
content: {"title":"Insecure Output Handling","severity":"high","overview":"LLM output passed to downstream components.","summary":"Enables XSS, SSRF, SQL injection.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/generate","description":"Rendered in browser"}],"evidence":[{"title":"XSS via output","request":"POST /generate with JS payload","response":"script tag in response"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"XSS","explanation":"Malicious output executes in browser."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Treat as untrusted","fix":"Validate and sanitize all output.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Request malicious content. 2. Observe in UI.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM02","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM03:2025-Training Data Poisoning
content: {"title":"Training Data Poisoning","severity":"medium","overview":"Malicious data in training corpus.","summary":"Backdoors and misinformation.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/finetune","description":"Fine-tuning endpoint"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Poisoned embeddings","request":"GET /search?q=product","response":"Competitor promoted"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Misinformation","explanation":"Model outputs bias."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Data validation","fix":"Validate training sources.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Check training sources. 2. Inject poisoned data.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM03","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM04:2025-Model DoS
content: {"title":"Model Denial of Service","severity":"high","overview":"Resource-heavy operations.","summary":"Excessive context window or recursive tool invocations.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/chat","description":"Resource exhaustion"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Context exhaustion","request":"POST /chat with huge input","response":"Processing takes minutes"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Service Degradation","explanation":"High resource usage impacts others."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Input limits","fix":"Limit input size and recursion.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Send large inputs. 2. Trigger recursive calls.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM04","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM05:2025-Supply Chain
content: {"title":"Supply Chain Vulnerabilities","severity":"high","overview":"Vulnerable dependencies in LLM lifecycle.","summary":"Unvetted models, poisoned data, vulnerable pipelines.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/api/v1/models/list","description":"Lists installed models"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Vulnerable dependency","request":"GET /models/list","response":"custom-model-v1.0"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Backdoors","explanation":"Compromised models."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Supply chain validation","fix":"Verify provenance, use signed models.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Review model sources. 2. Check signatures.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM05","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM06:2025-Sensitive Info Disclosure
content: {"title":"Sensitive Information Disclosure","severity":"critical","overview":"LLMs reveal sensitive information.","summary":"Memorized and regurgitated PII, passwords.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/completion","description":"Data extraction"}],"evidence":[{"title":"PII extraction","request":"POST /completion with partial credential","response":"Password123!"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Breach","explanation":"Leakage of training data."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Data sanitization","fix":"Remove PII from training data.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Craft extraction prompts. 2. Search for PII.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM06","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM07:2025-Insecure Plugin Design
content: {"title":"Insecure Plugin Design","severity":"high","overview":"Plugins execute with excessive permissions.","summary":"Plugins trust LLM output without validation.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/plugins/execute","description":"Plugin exec"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Unauthorized action","request":"POST /plugins/execute email send","response":"Email sent without auth"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Unauthorized Actions","explanation":"Plugins act on behalf of users."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Least privilege","fix":"Validate inputs, limit permissions.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Enumerate plugins. 2. Test permissions.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM07","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM08:2025-Excessive Agency
content: {"title":"Excessive Agency","severity":"high","overview":"LLM agents have excessive autonomy.","summary":"Destructive actions from adversarial inputs.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/agent/execute","description":"Agent execution"}],"evidence":[{"title":"File deletion","request":"POST /agent/execute","response":"Deleted files without confirmation"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Destruction","explanation":"Agents delete data."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Restrict capabilities","fix":"Require approval for destructive actions.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify agent capabilities. 2. Request destruction.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM08","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM09:2025-Overreliance
content: {"title":"Overreliance","severity":"medium","overview":"Systems overly trust LLM outputs.","summary":"Misinformation, bad code, security vulnerabilities.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/generate/code","description":"Code generation"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Insecure code","request":"POST /generate/code login","response":"Hardcoded credentials"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Security Vulns","explanation":"Generated code contains backdoors."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Human review","fix":"Review all generated code.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Request code generation. 2. Review for issues.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM09","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}

name: LLM10:2025-Model Theft
content: {"title":"Model Theft","severity":"medium","overview":"Unauthorized access to models.","summary":"Extraction, side channels, unauthorized access.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/chat","description":"Model query"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Excessive queries","request":"POST /chat with extraction prompt","response":"Detailed behavior replication data"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"IP Theft","explanation":"Functionality replicated."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Query limits","fix":"Rate limit and watermark outputs.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Query with extraction-style prompts. 2. Monitor volume.","references":[{"title":"OWASP LLM10","url":"https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/"}]}
